case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $700.00 U.S. CURR et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $700.00 U.S. CURR ENCY DOES 1-100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; FIRST SET OF FORM INTERROGATORIES; FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-10-2008 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 612

DISCOVERY 612, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS, FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. POS OF ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; FIRST SET OF FORM INTERROGATORIES; FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

MOTION FOR ORDER TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND STRIKING CLAIM; P&A; DECL OF PAMELA A. UNDERWOOD IN SUPPORT THEREOF, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR AUG-26-2009 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 612
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-26-2009 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 612

DISCOVERY 612, MOTION FOR ORDER TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND STRIKING CLAIM; P&A; DECL OF PAMELA A. UNDERWOOD IN SUPPORT THEREOF - NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR ORDER FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND STRIKING CLAIM IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
ORDER STRIKING THE CLAIM OF JERMAINE L ELLIS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $140.00 BE RELEASED TO JERMAINE L. ELLIS. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $560.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

calendar.matters:
MOTION For Order Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim; P&A; Decl Of Pamela A. Underwood In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Aug-26-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Petitioner People of the State of California's Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners' First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Sep-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Pamela Underwood, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: People of the State of California; no other appearances.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Petitioner People Of The State Of California's Motion To Compel Answers To First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents, First Set Of Special Interrogatories, And Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order.ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
